canonical.title: Birthday-gift decision brief — Flanders, 30-something, beyond the obvious

siblings.title: Belgian / EU artisan studios for one-off objects
siblings.summary: A shortlist of Belgian and EU artisan studios that take individual commissions for genuine one-off pieces, organised by discipline with realistic lead times and how-to-commission notes.

siblings.title: Private-access experiences reachable from Ghent in a day
siblings.summary: A shortlist of private and behind-the-scenes experiences inside Ghent and within a day's travel — restoration studios, lambic cellars, a 3-Michelin private kitchen, hot-air balloon at sunrise, and the once-a-year Royal Greenhouses.

siblings.title: Made-by-her workshops — where the artefact goes home with her that night
siblings.summary: Same-day-takeaway craft workshops ranked by heirloom potential, time, and budget — Belgium-anchored.

siblings.title: Personalised published artefacts that aren't trinkets
siblings.summary: A decision brief on substantive personalised gifts — biographies, photo books, custom songs, vinyl, star maps, documentaries — and which one earns the recipient's shelf space.

siblings.title: Time-extended gifts in obscure niches
siblings.summary: A taxonomy of slow-burn, multi-month, and multi-year gift formats keyed to obscure interest archetypes — pick the cadence first, then the niche.

sources.title: Saskia Shutt — Jewellery commissions Brussels
sources.claim: Brussels jeweller; Fairmined gold; ~6 weeks lead for a commission

sources.title: Atelier Decoster
sources.claim: Belgian leather atelier; optional 22k-gold initials on bespoke pieces

sources.title: Aristide Najean — Murano furnace
sources.claim: Murano glass commissions; 4–5 month lead at the upper end

sources.title: Galerij Theaxus — weaving images into tapestries
sources.claim: Bespoke woven tapestries; long-lead artisan commission

sources.title: PrivéPrivée — Sergio Herman
sources.claim: 12-seat private kitchen in Antwerp; €530 pp; ~9-month wait

sources.title: Royal Greenhouses of Laeken
sources.claim: Open three weeks per year; €7; closes 10 May

sources.title: MSK Ghent — Restoration of the Ghent Altarpiece
Kover-St — tufting training Brussels
sources.claim: 5-hour workshop delivering a finished 40×50 cm rug same day

sources.title: MIGLOT — perfume workshop
sources.claim: Brussels perfume workshop; formula stored for refills

sources.title: Greater Good (Berkeley) — How psychology can help you choose a great gift
sources.claim: Experiences yield more happiness than material goods because joy compounds across anticipation, the moment, and the memory
